tests.scenario: User selects a category of emotions and receives a list of at least 20 emotions
steps: Navigate to the emotion tracking page
Select a category of emotions
Verify the list of emotions presented
tests.expected_result: The user is presented with a list of at least 20 emotions to choose from

tests.scenario: User navigates to emotion tracking page with no category selected
steps: Navigate to the emotion tracking page without selecting a category
Verify the system's response
tests.expected_result: The system does not present a list of emotions until a category is selected

tests.scenario: User views emotional state graph after daily check-in
steps: Log in as an existing user
Complete a daily check-in with a specific emotional state
Navigate to the user's progress page
tests.expected_result: The user can view a graph of their emotional state over the past week, including the emotional state from the daily check-in just completed.

tests.scenario: User views emotional state graph with no prior check-ins
steps: Log in as an existing user with no prior daily check-ins
Navigate to the user's progress page
tests.expected_result: The user can view a graph of their emotional state over the past week, but the graph shows no data or a message indicating no data available.

tests.scenario: User receives actionable tips after daily check-in
steps: Complete a daily check-in as a registered user
Navigate to the insights page
Verify the presence of actionable tips
tests.expected_result: At least three actionable tips for managing emotional well-being are displayed

tests.scenario: User with no check-ins receives no tips
steps: Ensure no daily check-ins have been completed
Navigate to the insights page
Verify the absence of actionable tips
tests.expected_result: No actionable tips for managing emotional well-being are displayed

tests.scenario: User upgrades subscription plan
steps: Log in to the system as a registered user.
Navigate to the settings page.
Select the subscription option.
Choose an upgraded subscription plan.
Confirm the subscription change.
tests.expected_result: The user's subscription is updated to the upgraded plan.

tests.scenario: User downgrades subscription plan
steps: Log in to the system as a registered user with a premium subscription.
Navigate to the settings page.
Select the subscription option.
Choose a downgraded subscription plan.
Confirm the subscription change.
tests.expected_result: The user's subscription is updated to the downgraded plan.

tests.scenario: Emotion tracking response time test
steps: Log in to the system and navigate to the emotion tracking page
Select a random emotion from the provided options
Record the time it takes for the system to respond after selecting the emotion
tests.expected_result: The system responds within 2 seconds after selecting an emotion.

tests.scenario: Emotion tracking interface usability test
steps: Log in to the system and navigate to the emotion tracking page
Verify that the emotion selection options are clearly visible and user-friendly
Select an emotion and verify that the system provides a clear and immediate response
tests.expected_result: The system provides a user-friendly interface for tracking emotions and responds within 2 seconds after selecting an emotion.

tests.scenario: Accessing free features on main page
steps: Navigate to the app's main page
Click on the features section link
Verify the list of free features or content
tests.expected_result: At least five free features or pieces of content are accessible

tests.scenario: Validating free content availability
steps: Open the app and navigate to the main page
Locate and click on a free feature link
Access and review the content of the feature
tests.expected_result: The feature or content is accessible without any paywall or subscription prompt

tests.scenario: User views premium features with clear breakdown
steps: Log in as a registered user
Navigate to the premium features page
Locate and view the pricing section
tests.expected_result: The pricing section displays a detailed breakdown of each premium feature and its cost.

tests.scenario: User checks premium features page for detailed information
steps: Access the premium features page as a new user
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify the information provided
tests.expected_result: The pricing section clearly lists what each premium feature offers along with its cost.

tests.scenario: Accessing free alternative for premium insight
steps: Log in as a user and navigate to the insights page
Select a premium insight to view
Verify the presence of a free alternative or a summary of the premium content
tests.expected_result: The system displays a free alternative or a summary of the premium content

tests.scenario: Viewing summary when premium insight is chosen
steps: Log in as a user and navigate to the insights page
Choose to view a premium insight
Check for a link or button to view a free summary
tests.expected_result: The system allows access to a free summary of the premium content

tests.scenario: User receives guidance on mental health tracking feature
steps: Log in to the system as a registered user
Navigate to the mental health tracking page
Select the 'Mood Tracker' option
tests.expected_result: The system provides guidance on how to use the Mood Tracker feature for the user's specific needs

tests.scenario: User receives guidance on another mental health tracking feature
steps: Log in to the system as a registered user
Navigate to the mental health tracking page
Select the 'Sleep Tracker' option
tests.expected_result: The system provides guidance on how to use the Sleep Tracker feature for the user's specific needs

tests.scenario: User views average rating on main page and navigates to reviews
steps: Launch the app and ensure the user is on the main page
Navigate to the reviews section
Verify the displayed average rating
tests.expected_result: The average rating displayed is at least 4 out of 5 stars

tests.scenario: User navigates to reviews with low average rating
steps: Configure the system to have an average rating of 3.5 stars from users
Launch the app and ensure the user is on the main page
Navigate to the reviews section
tests.expected_result: The system indicates that the average rating is below 4 out of 5 stars, specifically 3.5 stars

tests.scenario: User receives questions for selected therapy topic
steps: Log in as a user and navigate to the therapy preparation page
Select a therapy topic from the provided list
Verify the system displays a list of questions related to the selected therapy topic
tests.expected_result: A list of questions to consider before the session is displayed

tests.scenario: User navigates to therapy preparation page without selecting a topic
steps: Log in as a user and navigate to the therapy preparation page
Do not select a therapy topic
Verify the system's response
tests.expected_result: No list of questions is displayed

tests.scenario: User accesses mental health tools and selects a resource
steps: Log in as a Self-Discovering User
Navigate to the mental health tools page
Select a mental health tool related to anxiety
tests.expected_result: The user can access a library of resources related to anxiety

tests.scenario: User accesses mental health tools and selects another resource
steps: Log in as a Self-Discovering User
Navigate to the mental health tools page
Select a mental health tool related to depression
tests.expected_result: The user can access a library of resources related to depression

tests.scenario: User views mood tracking page after completing daily check-in
steps: Log in as an existing user
Complete a daily check-in with a specific mood rating
Navigate to the mood tracking page
tests.expected_result: A graph displaying the user's mood changes over the past month is displayed

tests.scenario: User views mood tracking page without completing daily check-in
steps: Log in as an existing user who has not completed a daily check-in
Navigate to the mood tracking page
tests.expected_result: An empty graph or a message indicating no data available for mood changes over the past month is displayed

tests.scenario: User can set daily reminder for tracking option
steps: Log in to the system and navigate to the daily life tracking page
Select a tracking option from the available choices
Verify that the option to set a daily reminder is displayed and enabled
tests.expected_result: The system allows the user to set a daily reminder for the selected tracking option

tests.scenario: Daily reminder setting is accessible from tracking page
steps: Log in to the system and navigate to the daily life tracking page
Select a tracking option and then navigate to the reminder setting
Verify that the daily reminder can be set without any errors
tests.expected_result: The user can successfully set a daily reminder to complete the tracking from the daily life tracking page

tests.scenario: User views emotion patterns on insights page with multiple trends
steps: Log in as a valid user
Navigate to the insights page
View emotion patterns
tests.expected_result: At least two patterns or trends in emotional state are displayed

tests.scenario: User views emotion patterns on insights page with minimal trends
steps: Log in as a valid user with limited emotional data
Navigate to the insights page
View emotion patterns
tests.expected_result: At least two patterns or trends in emotional state are displayed, even if limited data is available
